description: Best-in-class client media plans from Joveo's portfolio - used as reference patterns for AI-generated plans

rtx_us.client: RTX (Raytheon Technologies) - Pratt & Whitney Christchurch Engine Centre
roles: Aircraft Engine Repair Mechanics (Level 3/4 Trade Certified)
rtx_us.hiring_volume: 93 hires across all roles over 12 months
key_insights: Highly niche talent pool in NZ (309 eligible in Christchurch); expanded to Australia to reach 40,419
Multiple pricing tiers offered (3 tiers) with different channel mixes and investment levels
Employer branding is critical for RTX's goal of becoming an 'iconic employer in Christchurch'
Trade shows recommended for offline activation - EMEX and NZ Aerospace Summit prioritized over Australian events
Multi-channel approach: Programmatic job boards + employer branding + trade shows + influencer marketing
Talent pool expansion to Australia made hiring targets realistic (0.11% of pool vs 1.5-4.5% in NZ alone)
Google Search Campaign included in higher tiers for additional application generation
Awareness-to-hiring spend ratio ranges from 30% (Tier 1) to 50% (Tier 3)
Competitor landscape includes EME Aero, TAE Aerospace, Air NZ Engineering, Qantas Engineering

bae_systems.hiring_volume: 200-400 Skilled Trade workers, 40-60 Technical/Support, Managers TBD
bae_systems.use_case: Labour sourcing for USS Iwo Jima (Wasp Class) FY26 Maintenance - critical modernization, maintenance, and repair programs

budget.note: Budget not explicitly specified in plan - pricing to be determined based on hiring volume and performance benchmarks

channels: University Level Recruitment / Local Community Colleges / Trade Schools
skilled_trades.rationale: Broadest approach involving different kinds of job boards supplemented by media channels and DSPs. Veteran job boards included for SkillBridge and Warrior Integration Program. Universities and trade schools for grassroots recruitment.

technical_support.rationale: More difficult to hire - requires qualified applicant partners, LinkedIn InMails, and database partners for direct outreach. Mass level media removed since role is niche.
technical_support.expansion_strategy: If requirements not met in Norfolk area, expand to Richmond, Lynchburg, Baltimore

managers.rationale: Most challenging role. Similar to Technical/Support but with more refined targeting. Media channels primarily LinkedIn and LinkedIn InMails.
managers.expansion_strategy: Region expansion likely needed. Industry expansion possible (e.g., Scheduler & Project Managers from Industrial Construction, Offshore Wind, Defense R&E)

budget_allocation.note: Budget allocation not explicitly quantified - strategy is role-based with different channel mixes per difficulty level

key_insights: US Citizenship required with CAC/DBIDS credentials - significant pipeline constraint
Veteran talent pipeline is critical - SkillBridge and Warrior Integration Program are key sources
30-40% of local labor pool has active security clearances via veteran programs
HII (Huntington Ingalls) is the dominant competitor with ~25,000 local employees
Three-tiered role-based channel strategy: broadest for trades, most targeted for managers
Region expansion planned if Norfolk area insufficient (Richmond, Lynchburg, Baltimore)
Industry expansion possible for managers (Industrial Construction, Offshore Wind, Defense R&E)
Time-to-fill ranges from 42 days (technical) to 60+ days (managers)
Cyclical industrial drain from plant outages creates temporary labor shortages

amazon_cs_india.hiring_volume: 1,500 Customer Service associates total (estimated 157,900 applications needed)

scenario_1.description: Joveo sources 20% of application requirement (~32,000 applications)

scenario_2.description: Joveo sources 30% of application requirement (~48,000 applications)

budget_allocation.strategy: Three-channel approach: Job boards (high traffic, low quality), Local social media (low traffic, moderate quality), Newspapers (high traffic, lowest quality)

key_insights: India is a high-volume application market - focus must shift to targeted, quality applications
Customer Service Associate is not commonly searched in India - better titles: Customer Support Executive, Call Center Agent, BPO Agent
Salary transparency is a must-have for Indian job seekers - CTC range must be clear
Application friction kills conversions - majority apply via mobile, long forms cause drop-offs
Amazon's 6-step application process with 3-hour estimate creates significant drop-off
Finding fluent English speakers is challenging and highly competitive
Local social media platforms (Sharechat, Moj, Josh) critical for reaching entry-level candidates in India
Newspapers serve as natural qualifier for English fluency
Non-traditional supply partners important for pre-qualifying candidates to ensure quality and intent
Two-scenario approach: 20% vs 30% contribution to total application requirement

rolls_royce_solutions_america.use_case: Main propulsion diesel engine repair for USCG vessels - providing labor, materials, equipment and technical expertise for scheduled and emergency repairs

awareness_5yr_plan.year_1: Brand Awareness - broad targeting, video/image ads, local radio, identify subreddits
awareness_5yr_plan.year_2: Brand Recall - dynamic ads, employee testimonials, expand to sports radio
awareness_5yr_plan.year_3: Brand Recall - interactive ads, geofencing, host AMAs, sponsor podcasts
awareness_5yr_plan.year_4: Brand Recall - UGC, employee takeovers, DCO, create subreddit
awareness_5yr_plan.year_5: Brand Recall - refined targeting, optimize, community management

hiring_campaigns.meta: Retarget warm audience built during awareness with 'Apply Now' messages
hiring_campaigns.google: Capture high-intent candidates actively searching for jobs via Search & PMax
hiring_campaigns.linkedin: Precision targeting by job title, skills, company, and industry groups
hiring_campaigns.indeed: Sponsored Job Listings for maximum visibility in default job search engine
hiring_campaigns.other_publishers: Industry-specific job boards and forums for niche audiences
hiring_campaigns.direct_marketing: Email campaigns, LinkedIn Recruiter for passive candidate sourcing

key_insights: 5-year phased awareness + hiring campaign strategy - most comprehensive plan in portfolio
Total annual budget ~$3M ($950K awareness + $2.05M hiring + $250K events)
DSPs/Digital billboards get highest awareness budget (23.2%) for blue-collar hotspot targeting
Blue-collar influencer marketing is a major channel ($200K/yr) with macro-to-nano mix
Location-specific channel recommendations for each of 3 geographies
Comprehensive educational partner network with trade schools and community colleges
Radio and podcast advertising tailored to each local market
Employee Ambassador Program yields highest ROI (2.0x) of all event categories
Marine-specific niche job boards (gCaptain, MarineLink, SeaCareer, AllMarinerJobs) are critical
Honolulu is the most constrained market (highest COLI ~170, smallest talent pool)
Charleston offers best cost-to-service ratio but is booming and competitive
Rzeszow is in Poland's 'Aviation Valley' - critical aerospace manufacturing hub
EME Aero (Jasionka, 8km away) is the most immediate staffing threat - direct competitor for same role
MTU Aero Engines in active expansion phase ('UPLIFT' strategy), aggressively hiring same profiles
Polish unemployment at 3.0% creates tight labor market despite lower wages
Cost of living advantage: COLI 55-60 vs Western EU, but talent retention is strong
35% of employers planning to expand hiring in region (logistics/transport leading)
Poland-specific job boards (Pracuj.pl, Praca.pl, GoWork.pl) are essential for local reach
Aviation-specific niche boards (aviationcv.com, JSFirm.com) critical for specialized roles
Tier 1 (budget) option removes all branding spend - focuses purely on application generation
European-specific platforms (Xing, Europe Language Jobs, EuroJobsites) broaden reach

peraton.use_case: Peraton as prime contractor for BNATCS (Brand New Air Traffic Control System) modernization for USDOT/FAA

budget.note: Budget not explicitly specified - pricing determined by role difficulty and channel selection

channels.niche_job_boards: Target highly specific skill sets on discipline-dedicated platforms
channels.cpqa_partners: Engaged for executive-level and senior technical advisor positions
channels.data_partners: Source passive candidates for hard-to-fill roles with direct approach

channels.global_job_boards: Core source for volume - maximize exposure
channels.regional_job_boards: Ensure geographical fit for multi-site roles
channels.university_recruitment: Direct sourcing for admin and production roles
channels.govt_job_boards: Critical for Aviation Ops roles requiring FAA/military experience
channels.social_media: High-volume approach for production and admin pipelines

benchmarks.note: Specific CPA/CPH not provided - role-based difficulty levels guide investment

budget_allocation.note: Role-based allocation - hard-to-fill roles get targeted expensive channels (CPQA/Data Partners), easy-to-fill roles get volume channels (job boards, social media)

key_insights: BNATCS (new air traffic control system) is a major national infrastructure modernization project
Executive search firms (Egon Zehnder, Heidrick & Struggles, Spencer Stuart) used for C-suite/leadership roles
FAA-specific job boards (FAAJobs, NTSB Careers) critical for aviation ops roles
ClearanceJobs essential for cleared IT and engineering positions
Two-category strategy: hard-to-fill (targeted/expensive) vs easy-to-fill (volume/cost-effective)
University partnerships span top engineering schools for pipeline building
Longest time-to-fill for Aviation Safety SME and CIO/CISO roles (60-120 days)
Competition includes major defense primes: Leidos, Booz Allen, CACI, Northrop Grumman, Lockheed Martin
Robert Half acts as staffing intermediary for Peraton
Diverse role mix (39 positions across 7 categories) requires highly segmented channel strategy

rtx_usa.hiring_context: Defense sector engineering talent with security clearance segmentation. Multi-city recruitment across three distinct defense industry hubs.

supply_demand.segmentation_note: Security clearance creates a critical supply bifurcation. Cleared talent pools are 3-5x smaller than total available supply. Consider sponsoring clearance to expand addressable market.

supply_hotspots.note: Largest cleared talent pool in US

competitors_per_city.competitive_insight: Defense sector has extremely concentrated competition. Top 5 competitors appear across ALL cities. Lockheed Martin and Northrop Grumman are the primary talent competitors in every market.

level_2.name: Moderate
level_2.example: 5+ years systems engineering in Tucson where supply is limited

level_3.name: Hard-to-Fill
level_3.criteria: Experience + location gap + security clearance requirement
level_3.example: 5+ years cleared software engineer in Huntsville (only 3,047 available)
level_3.strategic_note: Consider sponsoring security clearance instead of requiring existing clearance to expand talent pool by 3-5x

traditional_digital.purpose: Reach active and passive engineering candidates on platforms they already use

non_traditional_digital.purpose: Access untapped talent pools through emerging channels and community engagement
non_traditional_digital.geo_optimization_note: Optimize employer career pages and job descriptions for AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini) to capture candidates using conversational job search

traditional_offline.purpose: Build relationships and employer brand in defense community

non_traditional_offline.purpose: Create exclusive, high-value touchpoints for passive senior talent
non_traditional_offline.best_for: Level 3 hard-to-fill and senior leadership roles

tier_1_500k.focus: Digital channels prioritized - easier and cheaper to execute, faster time to first apply
tier_1_500k.best_for: Companies starting programmatic recruitment or with limited budget approval

tier_2_1m.focus: Increased scope with offline events and employer branding for higher reach and recall
tier_2_1m.best_for: Established defense contractors with brand recognition goals

tier_3_2m.focus: Full activation including influencer marketing, branded events, and premium sponsorships
tier_3_2m.best_for: Major hiring pushes requiring comprehensive market saturation

activation_events.name: CodeStock
activation_events.fit: Developer conference, mid/senior software engineers, 2hr from Huntsville

activation_events.name: CactusCon
activation_events.fit: Security community, red/blue teams, near Tucson

activation_events.name: SecureWorld Boston
activation_events.fit: Security practitioners, relocation pipeline from Boston hotspot

level_1.strategy: Standard programmatic distribution with performance optimization

level_2.strategy: Add location-based targeting and relocation incentive messaging

level_3.strategy: Full multi-channel activation with clearance sponsorship messaging

recommendations.key_insight: Consider sponsoring security clearance instead of requiring existing clearance to expand the addressable talent pool by 3-5x. This single change can transform Level 3 roles into Level 2 difficulty.
recommendations.clearance_sponsorship_roi: Average clearance processing costs $5K-$15K per person but expands addressable pool from ~3,000 to ~9,000+ in Huntsville alone

multi_channel_strategy.description: Expose target candidates via multiple channels at different foundational levels to achieve higher recall and social proof
example_sequence: 1. Programmatic job ad appears on job board (awareness)
2. Retargeted display ad on industry news site (reinforcement)
3. Sponsored Reddit post in r/engineering community (social proof)
5. In-person meeting at defense conference (relationship building)
multi_channel_strategy.expected_lift: 2-3x higher conversion rate vs single-channel approach

patterns_for_ai.supply_demand_framework: Always segment by security clearance status when analyzing defense sector supply. Cleared talent is a fundamentally different market.
patterns_for_ai.competitor_mapping: Map competitors per city AND per role. Defense sector competitors vary significantly by geography.
patterns_for_ai.budget_allocation: For defense, budget should shift from digital-heavy (70/30) at lower tiers to balanced (50/50) at higher tiers as offline events become critical for cleared talent.
patterns_for_ai.difficulty_scoring: Three-tier framework: experience-only (L1), experience+location (L2), experience+location+clearance (L3). Each level requires incrementally more channel activation.
patterns_for_ai.event_strategy: Defense industry events are not optional at Tier 2+. They are the primary channel for reaching passive cleared talent who do not respond to digital advertising.
patterns_for_ai.geo_expansion: When local supply is insufficient, target supply hotspots (DC, LA, Denver, Baltimore, DFW) with relocation messaging and remote-first positioning.

avg_channel_allocation.employer_branding: 20-50% of total budget depending on tier and brand awareness needs
avg_channel_allocation.media_channels_social: 10-15% of total budget for retargeting and awareness
avg_channel_allocation.dsps: 5-10% of total budget for display advertising

aerospace_defense.employer_branding_importance: High - brand recognition drives talent in niche markets
aerospace_defense.typical_budget_range: $70,000 - $1,000,000+ depending on hiring volume and region

defense_shipbuilding.employer_branding_importance: Medium - government stability and veteran programs are key differentiators
defense_shipbuilding.typical_budget_range: Variable based on hiring volume (200-400+ positions)

technology_ecommerce.employer_branding_importance: Low-Medium - volume hiring focuses on reach over brand

unique_approaches: University pipeline across top engineering schools

key_patterns: All plans use a mix of global + regional/local job boards as the primary application generation engine
DSPs (InMobi, StackAdapt, Taboola, etc.) appear in every plan as supplementary reach channels
CPQA/staffing partners are used across all plans for quality application delivery
Data partners (JuiceBox, Seekout) are standard for passive candidate re-engagement
Employer branding investment ranges from 0% (Tier 1 budget plans) to 50% (premium plans)
Defense/aerospace plans require specialized channels: veteran boards, clearance boards, aviation boards
India market requires localized social media (Sharechat, Moj) and newspapers for English qualification
5-year awareness campaigns are recommended for large-scale, long-term hiring commitments
Tiered pricing (3 tiers) is the standard proposal format, with more channels at higher tiers
Media channels (Meta, Google, LinkedIn) serve dual purpose: awareness retargeting and application generation
Defense sector requires security clearance segmentation in all supply-demand analysis
Clearance sponsorship can expand addressable talent pool by 3-5x
Budget allocation shifts from digital-heavy (70/30) to balanced (50/50) at higher investment tiers
Industry events are mandatory channels for cleared talent at Tier 2+ budgets
GEO Optimization (AI search engine visibility) is an emerging non-traditional digital channel
